subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been illumined with the lights of nearness and honored by the glances of favor. We have heard thy call and have answered thee through this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بانوار قرب منور و بلحاظ الطاف مشرف قد سمعنا ندائکم و اجبناکم بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
